arts.ttl: MOTD analysis: Everton penalty VAR intervention 'mind-boggling'
arts.sum: Ex-England captain Alan Shearer reflects on the controversial penalty decision during Everton's Premier League match against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man United chiefs are 'sick of hearing' about Sir Alex Ferguson's glory days while some bigwigs 'blame' legendary manager for recent woes with his £2m-a-year deal brutally cut
arts.sum: Ferguson, 83, was in charge at Old Trafford for 26 years and oversaw the most successful period in the club's history as he delivered 38 trophies, including 13 Premier League titles.

arts.ttl: Man United: 'Influential figures' blaming Sir Alex Ferguson for decline as INEOS 'obsession' revealed
arts.sum: 'Influential figures' at Manchester United allegedly feel that Sir Alex Ferguson is to blame for the Red Devils' dramatic fall from grace since his retirement.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target Spurs forward Son - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United considering move for Son Heung-min, Kevin de Bruyne close to MLS move, Real Madrid to rival Premier League trio for Castello Lukeba, plus more.

arts.ttl: Ashley Young penalty verdict delivered to Premier League referee as Everton draw
arts.sum: Everton drew with Manchester United in their final meeting at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho sends subtle Man Utd message after dropping to bench
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho had enjoyed a recent run of starts under Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim but was only given half an hour from the bench against Everton

arts.ttl: Penalty verdict and Hojlund demand as Manchester United rescue draw at Everton
arts.sum: United came away from their final trip to Goodison Park with a point

arts.ttl: What Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho did as Man United duo reunite
arts.sum: Manchester United loanees Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho reunited on Saturday evening during Aston Villa's clash with Chelsea

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd coach Eric Ramsay on why he has no regrets leaving the Premier League
arts.sum: Eric Ramsay raised a few eyebrows last season when he quit Manchester United to take up his first head coach role with Major League Soccer side Minnesota United - but it is a move that he hopes others will repeat
